query:
-- First, see how many orders need backfilling
SELECT id, childName, videoKey, LEFT(videoUrl, 80) as videoUrl_preview
FROM orders
WHERE videoKey IS NOT NULL AND videoKey != ''
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 20;
